channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Can $100 million overcome a Trump endorsement? What to watch in Tuesday’s elections
item.description: An endorsement from President Donald Trump is worth a lot in Republican primaries. But is it worth more than $100 million in political ads in Georgia?

item.title: Higher prices for gas, groceries and flights will likely outlast the Iran war
8 people died in B-52 bomber crash at US Air Force base in Southern California, officials say
